movie.actors: Sam Neill, William H. Macy, Téa Leoni, Alessandro Nivola
movie.plot: A decidedly odd couple with ulterior motives convince Dr. Grant to go to Isla Sorna, resulting in an unexpected landing, and startling new inhabitants on the island.
movie.title: Jurassic Park III
movie.writer: Michael Crichton (characters), Peter Buchman, Alexander Payne, Jim Taylor
